title: Add flutter_webrtc to Flutter project + call screen scaffold
description:
Add flutter_webrtc dependency and create call screen placeholder in android/ Flutter project.

Algorithm:
1. Edit android/pubspec.yaml: add flutter_webrtc: ^0.11.0 to dependencies
2. Run fvm flutter pub get in android/
3. Create android/lib/screens/call_screen.dart: StatefulWidget with Camera/Mic mute buttons, End Call button
4. Run fvm flutter analyze

Acceptance: fvm flutter analyze exits 0; no errors.
acceptance_criteria: fvm flutter analyze in android/ exits 0
close_reason: flutter_webrtc added; call_screen.dart created; flutter analyze clean
